title: draba arabisans var. orthocarpa
intro: Draba arabisans var. orthocarpa is a plant species belonging to the mustard family and is commonly known as the alpine whitlowgrass. The medicinal properties of Draba arabisans var. orthocarpa include its use in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially having antimicrobial effects. Draba arabisans var. orthocarpa is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
